subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Lord of Hosts! That loving God makes mighty every powerless one and enriches every destitute soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده رب جنود آن خداوند ودود هر ضعیف را توانا کند و هر فقیریرا توانگر
subcodes.subjects: @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @wealth inequality and its moderation
